name: SIHRE Platform
description: Public research platform, marketing website, and internal management workspace for the SIHRE (Self-Improving Heterogeneous Reasoning Ensemble) framework. Covers artifact management, content production, public website deployment, auth portal, monetization, and the SIHRE Control Plane SaaS product.

stack.cms: MDX files in GitHub + Conductor artifact manager
stack.hosting: Vercel (public site) + existing Conductor runtime (admin portal)
stack.ai_assistant: Claude API with RAG over public-safe SIHRE docs (P7+)

phases.name: SIHRE Project Bootstrap
phases.description: Create SIHRE project in Conductor. Migrate all 94 SIHRE_Wiki artifacts into structured Conductor artifacts with correct classification taxonomy (public-safe / public-after-review / internal-only / private-sensitive). Establish artifact types, status tags, and hard public/private boundary rules derived from PUBLIC_PRIVATE_MAP.md. Fix all SIRE naming errors in existing Conductor assets.
deliverables: SIHRE project registered in Conductor with correct name
Artifact taxonomy: 4-tier classification matching PUBLIC_PRIVATE_MAP.md
All 94 SIHRE_Wiki files mapped to Conductor artifact records
Public/private boundary rules enforced in data model
SIHRE phase roadmap (P0–P8) defined in Conductor
acceptance_criteria: No artifact classified 'private-sensitive' is reachable from a public route
NeuroFusion-13 references appear zero times in any public-safe artifact
All existing 'SIRE' references in Conductor renamed to 'SIHRE'
Conductor project page shows SIHRE with correct phase count

phases.name: Artifact Manager
phases.description: New Conductor dashboard capability: create, edit, organize, and classify all SIHRE artifacts. Markdown editor with live preview. Filter and sort by type (doc / research / GTM / social / roadmap / tracker / template), status (draft / review / final / published), and classification (public-safe / public-after-review / internal-only / private-sensitive). Replaces the Obsidian vault as the primary working surface.
deliverables: Artifacts page in Conductor dashboard (/artifacts)
Markdown editor with live preview panel
Classification badge: public-safe / public-after-review / internal-only / private-sensitive
Filter/sort: type, status, classification, updated date
All 94 SIHRE artifacts accessible, editable, and tagged
YAML frontmatter fields surfaced as form fields (tags, status, classification, source)
acceptance_criteria: Can open any of the 94 SIHRE_Wiki files, edit, and save from Conductor
Classification filter correctly narrows the artifact list
Markdown editor renders Mermaid diagrams (used in Diagram_Pack_Mermaid.md)
Artifact count per classification matches PUBLIC_PRIVATE_MAP.md (9 / 16 / 58 / 11)

phases.name: Roadmap & Action Items
phases.description: Visual SIHRE roadmap and sequenced action item tracker inside Conductor. Maps to the 7-phase monetization roadmap (Monetization_Roadmap.md) and the tiered artifact backlog (Artifact_Roadmap.md, Comprehensive_Artifact_Backlog.md). Tracks what needs to happen, in what order, with dependencies and owners.
deliverables: SIHRE roadmap view: phase cards with status, complexity, risk
Action items with sequence number, priority, owner, status, due date
Dependency graph visualization between action items
Pre-publication checklist (from Publication_Checklist.md and Whitepaper_Release_Checklist.md) as live tracker
Artifact completion tracker: 94 total, status per item
Research backlog view sourced from Research_Backlog.md
acceptance_criteria: Can create, edit, reorder, and complete action items
Roadmap phases link to artifact tracker filtered by phase
Pre-publication checklist items each have a status and owner
Artifact completion percentage visible on project overview

phases.name: Content & GTM Workspace
phases.description: Structured workspace for executing the SIHRE GTM plan. The 11 public website drafts (02_Public_Website), newsletter, press kit, social calendar, and outreach templates all live here as editable artifacts. Export to Markdown/PDF for distribution. This is where public content moves from 'draft' to 'final' before P4 deployment.
deliverables: All 11 Public_Website artifacts editable and export-ready
Social content calendar (sourced from Public_Content_Calendar.md)
Newsletter_Issue_1.md editable and exportable as HTML/Markdown
Press_Kit.md accessible with export to PDF
GTM outreach templates (email, pitch) from Offer_Ladder.md and Consulting_Audit_Template.md
Content status pipeline: draft → review → final → queued for publish
Export artifacts to Markdown and PDF
acceptance_criteria: Each of the 11 public website drafts has a status of 'final' or 'review' before P4 starts
Newsletter Issue 1 exports cleanly as HTML for Resend delivery
Press kit PDF export includes SIHRE one-liner, taglines, and key facts
Social calendar shows at least 4 weeks of scheduled content at P4 launch

phases.name: Public Website — SIHRE.ai
phases.description: Deploy the SIHRE public marketing site using the 11 already-drafted pages from 02_Public_Website. Next.js 14 + Vercel. Pages: Homepage, About, Architecture, Applications, Meta-Orchestrator, Whitepaper (PDF download + DOI citation block), FAQ, Blog/Announcements, Press Kit, Contact. Waitlist capture with email confirmation via Resend. SEO baseline. Evidence-level labels on all claims. NeuroFusion-13 boundary enforced — zero private-sensitive content reachable from public routes.
deliverables: sihre.ai live on Vercel (domain registration: sihre.ai, sihre.org, sihre.dev per Trademark_Checklist.md)
Homepage (Homepage_Draft.md), About (About_SIHRE.md), Architecture (Architecture_Page.md)
Applications (Applications_Page.md), Meta-Orchestrator (Meta_Orchestrator_Page.md)
Whitepaper page (Whitepaper_Page.md) with PDF download + DOI citation block
FAQ (FAQ.md), Blog with launch post (Blog_Post_Announcement.md)
Press Kit page (Press_Kit.md), Contact/waitlist page
Waitlist email capture → Resend confirmation email
SEO metadata + Open Graph per page
Plausible Analytics installed
Evidence-level label system: Framework / Proposed / Research-backed
Non_Goals.md content surfaced as 'What SIHRE is not' section (credibility)
Public/private boundary enforced: zero private-sensitive artifact content on any public page
acceptance_criteria: All 11 public website pages live and rendering correctly
Whitepaper PDF downloadable with correct DOI citation block
Waitlist form submits, user receives confirmation email via Resend
Plausible analytics recording pageviews
Lighthouse score ≥ 85 on performance, ≥ 90 on accessibility
Zero references to NeuroFusion-13, NeuroSpect, or private trading details on any public page
Evidence-level labels visible on Architecture and Meta-Orchestrator pages

phases.name: Portal & Auth
phases.description: Login layer accessible from sihre.ai nav and footer. Supabase Auth (signup, login, password reset). Protected /portal route. Role model: admin (Paul), beta-client, subscriber. Foundation for consulting client dashboards and paid research pack delivery. Admin manages users and content from Conductor.
deliverables: Supabase Auth integrated with sihre.ai
Login CTA in public site nav and footer
Protected /portal route (redirects to login if unauthenticated)
Role-based access: admin / beta-client / subscriber
Session persistence across page reloads
Admin can view user list and assign roles from Conductor
Password reset flow via Resend email
acceptance_criteria: Unauthenticated user hitting /portal is redirected to /login
Admin role has access to all portal content
Subscriber and beta-client roles have correctly scoped access
Session survives browser refresh
Password reset email delivered within 60 seconds

phases.name: Monetization Layer
phases.description: Revenue-enabling features mapped to Phase 2 of Monetization_Roadmap.md. Architecture Audit offer live as a bookable service (Consulting_Audit_Template.md). Research packs purchasable via Stripe (Paid_Research_Assets from Offer_Ladder.md). Consulting inquiry intake with email notification. Pricing page live. First paid offer bookable at launch.
deliverables: Pricing page on sihre.ai (Offer_Ladder.md tiers: free → research pack → audit → retainer)
Architecture Audit offer page with inquiry/booking form → email to Paul via Resend
Paid research pack delivery: Stripe payment → protected download link in /portal
Consulting inquiry intake form → email notification + Conductor action item created
Client onboarding artifact template in Conductor (from Consulting_Audit_Template.md)
First paid offer live, tested, and bookable
acceptance_criteria: Pricing page live with at least 3 offer tiers per Offer_Ladder.md
Architecture Audit inquiry form submits and triggers email to paul.russell@aldc.io
Stripe test payment for research pack succeeds, download link delivered
Paid download links require authenticated /portal session
Conductor creates an action item when a consulting inquiry is submitted

phases.name: Knowledge Base & Research Hub
phases.description: Searchable public knowledge base built from SIHRE's public-safe and public-after-review artifact library (25 files per PUBLIC_PRIVATE_MAP.md). Article pages for Architecture, Meta-Orchestrator, Evaluation, Governance, Glossary. Evidence-level labels on all claims. Internal search. Related article linking. AI documentation assistant (Claude RAG over public docs) as stretch goal.
deliverables: /docs or /research section on sihre.ai
Architecture, Meta-Orchestrator, Evaluation_Framework, Reliability_and_Governance article pages
Glossary page sourced from Glossary.md (public-safe)
Public_Safe_Examples.md as interactive examples section
Evidence-level labels on all article claims: Framework / Proposed / Research-backed
Internal search: Supabase full-text over public docs
Related article linking between docs pages
AI docs assistant: Claude API + RAG over public-safe artifact set (stretch goal)
acceptance_criteria: All 25 public-safe + public-after-review artifacts accessible as /docs pages
Evidence labels visible and explained to users
Search returns relevant results for terms from Glossary.md
No private-sensitive content reachable from /docs
Related articles surfaced on each docs page

phases.name: SIHRE Control Plane MVP
phases.description: The first production-grade SIHRE product: a reasoning governance dashboard for enterprise AI teams. Spec sourced from SIHRE_Control_Plane_PRD.md. Expert registry, task routing log, uncertainty summaries, disagreement detection, drift indicators, verification escalation log, expert reliability history, audit-ready decision trace export. Deployed as gated SaaS behind P5 auth at pilot pricing ($1k–$10k/mo per Pricing_Experiments.md).
deliverables: Expert/modality registry: register and manage reasoning components
Task routing log with full decision trace
Uncertainty and disagreement summary dashboards
Drift indicator panel
Verification and simulation escalation log
Expert reliability history charts
Audit-ready decision trace export (PDF + JSON)
Pilot pricing gate: $1k–$10k/mo per Pricing_Experiments.md
First pilot client onboarded and active
acceptance_criteria: Expert registry CRUD functional
Task routing log records and displays full decision trace
Uncertainty and disagreement dashboards display with synthetic data
Audit export generates valid PDF and JSON
At least one pilot client onboarded and paying
No SIHRE internal IP (NeuroFusion-13) exposed in client-facing views

decisions.reason: Fastest path to auth, storage, and full-text search with a single hosted service. Aligns with Next.js on Vercel. Avoids managing a separate auth service. Upgrade path to self-hosted is clear.

decisions.choice: MDX files in GitHub + Conductor artifact manager
decisions.reason: Content is already in Markdown. Conductor manages the editorial workflow internally. Public site reads from MDX files version-controlled in the SIHRE repo — no third-party CMS dependency, no vendor lock-in.

decisions.choice: Classification field on every artifact, enforced at API and route level
decisions.reason: PUBLIC_PRIVATE_MAP.md defines 11 private-sensitive files whose disclosure would compromise NeuroFusion-13 IP and provisional patent strategy. This boundary is non-negotiable and must be structural, not procedural.

decisions.choice: SIHRE throughout — no abbreviation to SIRE
decisions.reason: SIRE is an error. The canonical acronym is SIHRE (Self-Improving Heterogeneous Reasoning Ensemble). Branding consistency required from P0 forward.

decisions.choice: Consulting and research packs before SaaS (P6 before P8)
decisions.reason: Per Monetization_Roadmap.md, Architecture Audits ($7.5k–$15k) and research packs are immediate revenue with no SaaS build required. Consulting funds the Control Plane build. Never build P8 before validating demand through P6.
Privacy-first, GDPR-compliant, no cookie banner required. Consistent with SIHRE's governance and trust positioning. Avoids Google Analytics' credibility risk for a research-oriented brand.
